out_of_scope_note: eLife editorial decision letter (10.7554/elife.49834.sa1) accompanying the primary research article (companion canonical_id 55304df6). Decision letters are peer-review editorial documents — a one-sentence editor summary plus reviewer commentary — not the underlying research paper. The substantive scientific content (confidence-dependent reinforcement learning, trial-to-trial choice updating in perceptual decisions) is covered by the companion synopsis. Surfacing the decision letter as a separate recommendation would duplicate the primary paper at the cost of a researcher interview turn.
